commands.review_summary:
Adds a `tart` local-VM provider with CLI flags, YAML/env config, lifecycle management, cleanup/doctor support, provider registration, and unit tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defect: source inspection of the PR head shows `strconv.Itoa` used in `internal/providers/tart/backend.go` while the import block omits `strconv`. The actual tart VM lifecycle was not re-run in this Linux review environment, but the PR body includes terminal lifecycle proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking repair is narrow and mechanical; maintainer review can still decide provider acceptance after the branch compiles.

target.title: feat: add tart provider for macOS VMs on Apple Silicon
target.body:
## Summary

Add a `tart` provider for running macOS VMs on Apple Silicon via [Cirrus Labs tart](https://github.com/cirruslabs/tart). This enables local macOS staging environments using Apple's native Virtualization.framework -- no Parallels license needed.

## How it works

- **Acquire**: `tart clone` from OCI base image, `tart set` CPU/memory/disk, `tart run --no-graphics`, poll `tart ip`, inject SSH key, wait for SSH readiness
- **Resolve**: find running VM by `crabbox-` name prefix
- **List**: `tart list --format json` filtered by prefix
- **Release**: `tart stop` + `tart delete`
- **Cleanup**: garbage collect stale VMs past idle timeout
- **Doctor**: verify tart CLI and list capability

Shared directories for credential/auth injection via `tart run --dir=tag:path`.

## Proof

Full lifecycle proven on M4 Pro Mac (macOS 26.4.1) over Tailscale SSH, tart 2.32.1:

```
=== PROOF: tart lifecycle ===
--- list ---
local  crabbox-proof-test  50  30  8 seconds ago  running
--- get ---
OS     CPU Memory Disk DiskFormat Size   Display  State
darwin 4   8192   50   raw        30.952 1024x768 running
--- ip ---
192.168.64.2
--- exec uname ---
Darwin admins-Virtual-Machine.local 22.6.0 Darwin Kernel Version 22.6.0 ARM64_VMAPPLE arm64
--- exec sw_vers ---
ProductName:  macOS
ProductVersion: 13.7.4
BuildVersion: 22H420
--- stop ---
STOP_DONE
--- list after stop ---
local  crabbox-proof-test  50  30  in 0 seconds  stopped
--- delete ---
DELETE_DONE
--- list after delete ---
NO_VMS
=== PROOF COMPLETE ===
```

Clone (22.6GB) + set + run + IP (~10s) + exec + stop + delete -- all working.

## Configuration

CLI flags: `--tart-image`, `--tart-cpu`, `--tart-memory`, `--tart-disk`

YAML (`.crabbox.yaml`):
```yaml
tart:
  image: ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest
  user: admin
  cpus: 4
  memory: 8192
  disk: 50
```

Env vars: `CRABBOX_TART_IMAGE`, `CRABBOX_TART_USER`, `CRABBOX_TART_WORK_ROOT`, `CRABBOX_TART_CPUS`, `CRABBOX_TART_MEMORY`, `CRABBOX_TART_DISK`

## Files changed

- `internal/providers/tart/provider.go` -- provider registration, spec, capability
- `internal/providers/tart/backend.go` -- full SSHLeaseBackend lifecycle (~715 lines)
- `internal/providers/tart/core.go` -- type aliases bridging core exports
- `internal/providers/tart/flags.go` -- CLI flag registration
- `internal/providers/tart/provider_test.go` -- 12 unit tests
- `internal/cli/config.go` -- TartConfig struct, file config, env var loading
- `internal/cli/providers_builtin_test.go` -- test provider registration
- `internal/providers/all/all.go` -- import registration

## Test plan

- [x] 12 provider unit tests pass (spec, targets, flags, list, doctor, cleanup)
- [x] Local ClawSweeper review: "patch is correct"
- [x] Real lifecycle proof on M4 Pro Mac: clone + set + run + ip + exec + stop + delete
- [ ] `go build` / `go vet` (Go not on dev machine -- CI will verify)
